calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-07-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Re-Notice Of Hearing Re: Deft'S Application For Good Faith Settlement; Pos
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edgar W. Hawkyard, Esq., of the Law Offices of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500 x821, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
No other appearance.

The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES PFLAGING Re-Notice Of Hearing Re: Defendant's Application For Good Faith Settlement is Denied. The moving party has not provided any non-conclusory evidence showing that it has no liability. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Re-Notice Of Hearing Re: Deft'S Application For Good Faith Settlement; Pos
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Continued To Feb-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Lane, Esq., of the Law Offices of Gregory V. DeBernard, Tel. 925.977.1402, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Matthew D. Gramly, Esq., of the Dolan Law Firm, Tel. 415.421.2800, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.
Edward W. Hawkyard, Esq., of the Law Offices of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. 925.825.9500 x821, appearing for defendant Barron Rhodes Flanders via court call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES PFLAGING'S Re-Noticed Hearing Re: Defendant's Application For Good Faith Settlement is continued to Feb. 29, 2012. Moving party to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to the court no later than Monoday, Feb. 27. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918
